articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: India Cricket Tour Zimbabwe 2026: T20I Schedule & US Watch Guide
articles.what_this_means: India will tour Zimbabwe for three T20Is in July 2026, with Zimbabwe returning to India for three ODIs in January 2027 (their first bilateral series in India since 2002). US-based NRI cricket fans can catch the action on Willow TV with early morning ET broadcasts. This bilateral commitment follows the excitement of IPL 2025 and provides crucial player rotation opportunities for India.

articles.title: Rajesh Khanna Legal Case: What Bollywood Fans Should Know
articles.what_this_means: The Bombay High Court dismissed Anita Advani's legal claim seeking marital recognition with late superstar Rajesh Khanna, closing a decade-long legal battle. The ruling has no impact on Khanna's cinematic legacy, which remains accessible through Netflix, Prime Video, and Hotstar for diaspora audiences. This case highlights Indian legal processes around marriage recognition while reminding fans that cinema—not courtrooms—is where legends truly live on.

articles.title: India vs Australia Test 2025: CA Contract Updates Before Tour
articles.what_this_means: Cricket Australia has announced its contract list for the India tour, bringing in batter Jason Weatherald and fast bowler Michael Neser while dropping Joel Richardson. This signals Australia's shift toward conditions-specific selections for Indian pitches ahead of the five-Test series in early 2025.

articles.title: Amelia Kerr's 179* Leads NZ Cricket Record Chase vs South Africa
articles.what_this_means: Amelia Kerr's unbeaten 179 led New Zealand to the highest successful run chase in women's ODI history—347 runs against South Africa. Indian cricket fans in the US can catch this and all India cricket matches on Willow TV, Disney+ Hotstar, or ESPN+.

articles.title: Call Me Bae Season 2: Shruti Haasan Joins Ananya Panday in Thailand
articles.what_this_means: Shruti Haasan is joining Ananya Panday's hit Netflix web series Call Me Bae for Season 2, currently filming in Thailand. The show will premiere on Netflix in 2025. Here's where to watch and what to expect from this exciting expansion of the beloved Indian web series.
